title: Emotional Infrastructure Governance Deployment System Public Artifact Index

records.description: AI consent audit SaaS prototype with API, web app, auth, events, reports, billing, and hash-chain components.
records.portfolio_value: Potential commercial seed asset because it expresses the revenue layer as software, but it must be security-reviewed before deployment.

records.description: Complete reference for authorization boundaries and permitted system action limits.
records.portfolio_value: Useful as a policy-layer companion for consent, access control, and enforcement architecture.

records.description: Full expansion of Emotional Infrastructure concepts and governance framing.
records.release_status: Public as foundation paper or white paper
records.portfolio_value: Useful as the conceptual foundation, but it should be edited into an executive white paper before broad circulation.

records.description: PDF representation of package or JSON material connected to implementation packaging.
records.portfolio_value: May support implementation evidence, but needs labeling and integration into a developer package.

records.description: Governing edition of the Emotional Infrastructure specification.
records.portfolio_value: Valuable as standards seed material, but it requires normative formatting and testable conformance mapping before formal standards circulation.

records.description: TypeScript SDK and test suite bundle with consent utilities, tests, examples, and CI scaffolding.
records.portfolio_value: Technically valuable because it demonstrates running-code direction; requires installation verification, README expansion, and license selection.

records.description: Research portfolio database for tracking papers, figures, appendices, and project assets.
records.portfolio_value: Valuable as a control system for managing the research portfolio, but it should be expanded before public use.

records.description: APA 7 Word manuscript for Paper 1 in the EIT research series.
records.portfolio_value: Primary editable source for journal submission and CEITR routing.

records.description: PDF version of Paper 1 for review, sharing, and controlled distribution.
records.portfolio_value: Portfolio-ready proof of completed academic writing.

records.description: Complete Paper 1 package containing manuscript, cover letter, journal strategy, and README.
records.portfolio_value: High-value package because it contains the operational components required to move beyond drafting.

records.description: Journal targeting and submission strategy for Paper 1.
records.portfolio_value: Useful for sequencing submissions and avoiding random journal placement.

records.description: Updated Paper 2 package with manuscript, cover letter, revision memo, figure, schemas, manifest, and appendices.
records.portfolio_value: One of the most valuable completed artifacts because it connects theory, protocol logic, schemas, and review documentation.

records.description: Cover letter for Paper 2 submission.
records.portfolio_value: Operationalizes journal submission instead of leaving the paper as an isolated draft.

records.description: Revision memo documenting improvements to Paper 2.
records.portfolio_value: Supports reviewer-facing clarity and shows serious revision discipline.

records.description: Editable APA 7 Paper 2 manuscript on EIT as a policy translation layer for longitudinal AI interaction systems.
records.portfolio_value: Strong portfolio anchor for AI governance, policy engineering, and standards-oriented roles.

records.description: PDF version of Paper 2 with deterministic logic, schemas, audit traceability, figure, and expanded literature integration.
records.portfolio_value: Highest-value current research artifact for external credibility because it is complete, bounded, and defensible.

records.description: Short systems-level report defining Emotional Infrastructure, LIL, TAR, PDEV, and strategic contribution.
records.portfolio_value: Useful as a short overview for portfolio visitors, funders, employers, or collaborators.

records.description: Large iOS/securityd diagnostic text log containing system telemetry and application references.
records.release_status: Private; do not publish without redaction
records.portfolio_value: Valuable as personal forensic evidence only after minimization, redaction, and chain-of-custody labeling.

records.description: Paper presenting PDEV middleware as a consent and behavioral signal sovereignty standard.
records.portfolio_value: Strong concept asset, but it needs formatting, stronger citations, and removed overclaims before external submission.

records.description: Contract rider for behavioral sovereignty terms in employment, service, or academic contexts.
records.portfolio_value: Potentially monetizable as a template asset, but must be legally reviewed before sale or deployment.

records.description: Word document related to trajectory governance manuscript development.
records.portfolio_value: Useful as source material, but current canonical status must be reconciled against PDF manuscript versions.

records.description: Methodology expansion for the trajectory governance manuscript, providing research design and construct development detail.
records.portfolio_value: Strengthens review credibility by showing reproducible design logic and academic method scaffolding.

records.description: Core research paper on governing emotional trajectories in AI-mediated education, aligned to Computers and Education: Artificial Intelligence positioning.
records.portfolio_value: High-value flagship research artifact; use for CEITR review, journal submission, and portfolio lead.
